data.reason:
Approved with LOP: Hi sir, 

I am requesting to extend my leave one more day. 
As per scheduled timing I reached but they changed the timing at 9pm today. 
Tomorrow I’ll finish my treatment and I’ll return back. 
Apology for the inconvenience sir.

Approved with LOP: I would like to request leave to attend the wedding card pooja conducted at our home god. As the pooja for our family deity is performed only on Mondays, my presence is required for the ritual.
